title: aira fontqueriana
intro: Aira fontqueriana, also known as Fontquer's Hair Grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Aira fontqueriana include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
